[2-4] A hand reaches in from above, releasing small golden-brown crumbs onto the central bar over the wet chocolate drizzle. [4-6] The hand returns to grasp the central oat bar, fingers positioning on either side of the treat covered in chocolate and crumbs. [6-8] Large, capitalized white text reading "BUTTERFINGER RICE KRISPIE TREATS" appears centered as hands lift the prepared bar, displaying the topping while background elements remain partially obscured.

Inside a grey pot, a wooden spoon stirs a smooth, glossy tan liquid, creating circular ripples. White cylindrical marshmallows are dropped into the mixture, accompanied by the centered white text "MARSHMALLOWS". A hand continues adding more marshmallows to the pot from above. The wooden spoon then vigorously stirs the white marshmallows into the melted tan base. As the spoon agitates the ingredients, the marshmallows shift position, become coated in the sticky liquid, and begin to melt and blend into the mixture.

[12-14] Inside the pot, melted butter and peanut butter form a smooth light brown liquid, stirred vigorously by a wooden spoon into a creamy texture. [24-28] White marshmallows are stirred into the tan mixture, dissolving significantly to create a thick, stringy, and cohesive sticky texture. The mixture becomes a uniform, gooey beige mass as white chunks dissolve and the substance becomes smoother. [28-30] The wooden spoon stirs the now smooth, glossy beige mixture in the silver pot, lifting to reveal its thick, viscous consistency coating the wood. [30-32] A hand pours a large quantity of light yellow puffy rice cereal from a glass container into the pot while white capital text reading "RICE KRISPIES" appears centered over the falling cereal.

[32-34] Light yellow rice cereal is poured from a clear glass container into a silver pot, accumulating over a thick beige mixture and wooden spoon. [34-38] A hand vigorously stirs the dry grains into the sticky base using the wooden spoon, coating the cereal as the spoon moves through the pot. [38-40] The ingredients combine into a cohesive, clumpy mass with visible stringy strands connecting the cereal pieces, appearing uniform and gooey. [40-42] The mixture settles as a dense, uniform mass filling the bottom of the pot, thoroughly coated in the sticky beige base with the spoon resting inside.

[42-44] A hand pours crushed light brown pieces into the silver pot over the sticky cereal mixture. The dry, crumbly fragments fall onto the cohesive brown base, adding a distinct new texture layer as the stream of toppings lands on the combined ingredients. [44-50] A wooden spoon stirs the crushed light brown candy pieces into the sticky rice cereal mixture inside the silver pot. The spoon vigorously mixes the sticky, stringy mass, folding the rice cereal and crushed candy pieces together. The ingredients blend into a cohesive, gooey brown texture as the spoon lifts and turns the contents, ensuring the crunchy fragments are evenly distributed throughout the mixture. [50-52] Finally, the scene cuts to a clear glass square baking dish where two bare hands press down firmly on the transferred brown, textured mixture, flattening it into an even, compact layer within the container to complete this preparation step.

recent_thinks: [8-10] The scene changes to a top-down view of a grey pot. Hands hold a small white bowl containing a creamy tan mixture over the pan while a spoon stirs it. White text 'BUTTER & PEANUT BUTTER' appears centrally. A bowl of brown crumbles is visible in the top left corner on a striped cloth.

[10-12] The text overlay vanishes. Hands tilt the small white bowl, pouring the creamy tan mixture into the grey pot where a butter square sits. A metal spoon scrapes the remaining contents from the bowl into the pan, combining ingredients.

[52-54] A square glass baking dish rests on a white surface, filled with the flattened brown mixture. Visible rice cereal grains and chunks create a textured surface. Hands hold the sides of the clear container, displaying the compacted treat.
